title: Minor cut - bread slicer
description: Sandwich Artist Carlos Mendoza sustained minor laceration on left index finger while cleaning bread slicer. First aid applied on site. No stitches required. Worker returned to duty with bandage and glove. Slicer blade guard inspected and found functional.

title: Slip on wet floor - near miss
description: Customer slipped on wet floor near entrance during rain storm. No injury sustained. Wet floor sign was posted but customer did not notice. Added second sign and non-slip mat at entrance. Incident documented per franchise protocol.
